COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Allow Entry Of Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Sipes, Esq. 866-656-7080 for Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor INCENTIVE FINANCIAL SERVICES,LLC.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF INCENTIVE FINANCIAL SERVICES,LLC' Motion To Allow Entry Of Renewal Of Judgment.

Plaintiff Incentive Financial Services, LLC's motion to allow entry of renewal of judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Plaintiff is granted leave to file an application for renewal of judgment and, if that application is filed no later than January 25, 2019, it will be deem filed as of November 2, 2018.

Counsel for plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
